pageContext.name: Eternal Sailor Moon
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai are excited to present the Eternal Sailor Moon Collectible Figure!  S.H.Figuarts technology brings beautiful proportions, dramatic expressions, and cute action poses to life! A gorgeous costume is complemented by equally beautiful wings, hair, and ribbons rendered in translucent plastic. Optional facial expressions, hands, and an Eternal Tiara accessory put you right in the middle of the drama.   Don't miss your chance to add this Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon to your anime collection!
